column1: # Dates are the closest defensible daily anchor for the named event peak.
# Brisbane 2011: corrected from seed 2011-01-11 (Toowoomba/Lockyer flash-flood day)
#   to 2011-01-13 — Brisbane River peaked at 4.46 m AHD at 3am 13 Jan (BOM fact sheet).
#   — Burnett River at Bundaberg peaked at 9.53 m (new record) on 29 Jan (BOM Oswald report).
# Townsville 2019: corrected from seed 2019-02-03 (dam release night) to 2019-02-04
#   — downstream Ross River suburban flooding peaked ~11am 4 Feb (TCC media release).
# QLD/NSW 2022: seed 2022-02-28 confirmed — Brisbane River peaked 3.85 m
# WA Warmun 2011: seed 2011-03-13 retained — peak within 10–14 Mar window; 13 Mar
#   aligns with reported weekend evacuation and AIDR knowledge hub timeline.
# WA Fitzroy 2023: seed 2023-01-04 confirmed — Fitzroy Crossing peaked 15.81 m on 4 Jan (NASA EO).

column3: QLD Flood Extent Series (BOM fact sheet: Brisbane City gauge 4.46 m 3am 13 Jan)
QLD Flood Extent Series (BOM Oswald report: Burnett R Bundaberg 9.53 m 29 Jan)
QLD Flood Extent Series (TCC media release: downstream peak ~11am 4 Feb)
QLD Flood Extent Series (benchmark day; Brisbane R 3.85 m Wivenhoe 184%)
VIC VFD Oct 2022 dataset (Rochester and Seymour inundated 14 Oct)
WA DWER-123 (peak within 10-14 Mar window; evacuation weekend 13 Mar)
WA DWER-123 (NASA EO: Fitzroy Crossing 15.81 m record on 4 Jan)
